style_effects: Gentle, shimmering water droplets cling to Growlithe's fur, slowly rising and dissolving into soft blue mist above its body. A cool, luminous aura of deep cerulean light pulses gently around its form, casting ripples of reflected water across the ground. The atmosphere glows with a serene, calming blue-white luminescence, as if submerged in a tranquil ocean at dawn. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
